PIO-Processing</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="200" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg-mem" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">Memory (DMA)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="175" x="420" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg-hw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">Hardware (PIO)</font>" vertex="1"> style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">ISR (CPU)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="175" x="420" y="1026" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg-data" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffde7;strokeColor=#f9a825;opacity=50;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=18;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">MEMORY (DMA)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="940" x="200" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg-proc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1565c0;opacity=50;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=18;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;strokeWidth=3;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">PROCESSING (PIO)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="760" x="307" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg-isr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3e5f5;strokeColor=#7b1fa2;opacity=50;verticalAlign=bottom;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;spacingLeft=18;spacingBottom=8;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">INTERRUPT SERVICE ROUTINE (CPU)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="940" x="200" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rgb-buf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=12;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>rgb_buffer</b> (read_chan -&gt; source)<br><font color="#666666">Complete RGB pixel data of matrix panel</font><br><br><font face="monospace" color="#333333">[ R G B | R G B | R G B | ... ]<br>[ &nbsp;px0 &nbsp;| &nbsp;px1 &nbsp;| &nbsp;px2 &nbsp;| ... ]</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="400" x="220" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bitplane-buf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=12;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>frame_buffer + offset</b> (write_chan -&gt; target)<br><font color="#666666">Bitplane-Slice of matrix panel (1 bit per pixel)</font><br><br><font face="monospace" color="#333333">[ – – B<sub>n</sub> G<sub>n</sub> R<sub>n</sub> B<sub>n</sub> G<sub>n</sub> R<sub>n</sub> | ... ] </font><br><font color="#888888">Bit n = shamt from BCM_SEQUENCE[bitplane]</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="400" x="710" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pio-prog" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=12;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>PIO: hub75_bitplane_setup</b><br><font color="#666666">Reads RGB-word, shifts for&nbsp;<b>shamt</b>&nbsp;bits,<br>pack 6 R/G/B slice bits into a byte</font><br><font face="monospace" color="#1a237e">IN PINS, 1 ; R0-Bit read<br>IN PINS, 1 ; G0-Bit read<br>IN PINS, 1 ; B0-Bit read</font><div><font face="monospace" color="#1a237e"><span style="caret-color: rgb(26, 35, 126); color: rgb(26, 35, 126);">IN PINS, 1 ; R1-Bit read</span><br style="caret-color: rgb(26, 35, 126); color: rgb(26, 35, 126);"><span style="caret-color: rgb(26, 35, 126); color: rgb(26, 35, 126);">IN PINS, 1 ; G1-Bit read</span><br style="caret-color: rgb(26, 35, 126); color: rgb(26, 35, 126);"><span style="caret-color: rgb(26, 35, 126); color: rgb(26, 35, 126);">IN PINS, 1 ; B1-Bit read</span><br></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="300" x="327" y="307" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isr-box" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;spacingLeft=8;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>read_chan_handler</b> (DMA-ISR, CPU bound)<br><br><font face="monospace" color="#4a148c">dma_channel_acknowledge_irq1(read_chan);<br><span style="caret-color: rgb(0, 128, 0); color: rgb(0, 128, 0); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-size: 12px; white-space: pre; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">// Go through all bitplanes in sequence</span><br>if (++bitplane &lt; bcm_sequence_length) {</font></font><div><font style="font-size: 14px;"><font face="monospace" color="#4a148c">&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="color: rgb(0, 128, 0); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-size: 12px; white-space: pre; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">// Set shift to suit next bitplane</span><br>&nbsp;&nbsp;shamt = BCM_SEQUENCE[bitplane];<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;hub75_bitplane_setup_set_shift(..., shamt);<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="caret-color: rgb(0, 128, 0); color: rgb(0, 128, 0); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-size: 12px; white-space: pre; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">// Set write address to next slice</span><br>&nbsp;&nbsp;plane_dst = frame_buffer + (bitplane * (PIXELS&gt;&gt;1));<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;dma_channel_set_write_addr(write_chan, plane_dst);<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="caret-color: rgb(0, 128, 0); color: rgb(0, 128, 0); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-size: 12px; white-space: pre; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">// Set read address to start of rgb_buffer</span><br>&nbsp;&nbsp;dma_channel_set_read_addr(read_chan, rgb_buffer);<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;dma_start_channel_mask(read_chan | write_chan);<br>} else {<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;<span style="color: rgb(0, 128, 0); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-size: 12px; white-space: pre; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">// Rebuild of frame_buffer complete - swap to accommodate for next update</span><br>&nbsp;&nbsp;frame_buffer = (frame_buffer == fb1) ? fb2 : fb1;<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;swap_frame_buffer_pending = true;<br>}</font></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="900" x="220" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="transform-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f5e9;strokeColor=#388e3c;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;spacingLeft=8;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>Bit-Extraktion (shamt = n)</b><br><br><font face="monospace">RGB-word: [R<sub>7</sub>…R<sub>n</sub>…R<sub>0</sub>] [G<sub>7</sub>…G<sub>n</sub>…G<sub>0</sub>] [B<sub>7</sub>…B<sub>n</sub>…B<sub>0</sub>]<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;↓ shift &gt;&gt; n<br>Slice-byte: [– – B<sub>n</sub> G<sub>n</sub> R<sub>n</sub> B<sub>n</sub> G<sub>n</sub> R<sub>n</sub>]</font><br><br><font color="#388e3c">BCM_SEQUENCE determines the sequence of bitplanes</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="370" x="682" y="308" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-rgb-pio" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#d6b656;exitX=0.56;exitY=1.012;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.347;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryPerimeter=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="494.0000000000002" y="211.20000000000005" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="494.10000000000014" y="307" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-arrow-rgb-pio" connectable="0" parent="arrow-rgb-pio" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;rounded=1;fontSize=14;" value="<font>DMA read_chan</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="0.5" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="5" y="-14" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-pio-buf" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;exitX=0.974;exitY=0.006;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" rgb_buffer (read_chan -> source)
Complete RGB pixel data of matrix panel
[ R G B | R G B | R G B | ... ]

Bitplane-Slice of matrix panel (1 bit per pixel)

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Reads RGB-word, shifts for shamt bits,
pack 6 R/G/B slice bits into a byte

IN PINS, 1 ; R0-Bit read
IN PINS, 1 ; G0-Bit read
IN PINS, 1 ; B0-Bit read

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 890px; height: 1px; padding-top: 533px; margin-left: 30px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 360px; height: 1px; padding-top: 291px; margin-left: 492px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font:
RGB-word: [R7…Rn…R0] [G7…Gn…G0] [B7…Bn…B0]
↓ shift >> n
Slice-byte: [– – Bn Gn Rn Bn Gn Rn]
BCM_SEQUENCE determines the sequence of bitplanes
